OK: Nightly sync at wrong time - evt-002 correctly not fired at 2025-01-15T23:30 UTC

Core scheduler logic. Determines which events are due to fire

from datetime import datetime
import pytz

def is_due(event_tz, event_hour, event_minute, window_start_utc, window_end_utc):
    tz = pytz.timezone(event_tz)
    local_start = window_start_utc.astimezone(tz)
    from datetime import timedelta
    dates_to_check = [
        local_start.date() - timedelta(days=1),
        local_start.date(),
        local_start.date() + timedelta(days=1)
    ]

OK: UTC noon health check - evt-005 fires at 2025-01-15T12:00 UTC

OK: EST nightly sync (crosses midnight) - evt-002 fires at 2025-01-16T04:30 UTC
